시편 98:1.content: Sing to Yahweh a new song, for he has done marvelous things! His right hand and his holy arm have worked salvation for him.

시편 98:2.content: Yahweh has made known his salvation. He has openly shown his righteousness in the sight of the nations.

시편 98:3.content: He has remembered his loving kindness and his faithfulness toward the house of Israel. All the ends of the earth have seen the salvation of our God.

시편 98:4.content: Make a joyful noise to Yahweh, all the earth! Burst out and sing for joy, yes, sing praises!

시편 98:5.content: Sing praises to Yahweh with the harp, with the harp and the voice of melody.

시편 98:6.content: With trumpets and sound of the ram’s horn, make a joyful noise before the King, Yahweh.

시편 98:7.content: Let the sea roar with its fullness; the world, and those who dwell therein.

시편 98:8.content: Let the rivers clap their hands. Let the mountains sing for joy together.

시편 98:9.content: Let them sing before Yahweh, for he comes to judge the earth. He will judge the world with righteousness, and the peoples with equity.
